hero.heading: Discover, Invest, and Live in Paradise.
hero.sub: The Dominican Republic's real estate ecosystem — luxury properties, investing tools, and AI-powered guidance — in one trusted platform.

empty.title: Inventory coming soon
empty.sub: New properties are being verified and will appear here shortly.

deal.disclaimer: How we pick: each week our team selects one property where location, lifestyle, and price-per-m² genuinely stand out. Owners and realtors can submit a property for consideration — our team reviews every submission for value and quality before featuring it.

founder.heading: We were once where you are now.
founder.para1: We're Americans who moved to the Dominican Republic for the same reasons most of you are considering it — the climate, the cost of living, the pace, the long-term opportunity, and a Caribbean lifestyle that doesn't require a passport stamp every six months.
founder.para2: Like most expats, we thought we'd done our homework. We hadn't. We overpaid on our first property, because the listing price in the DR isn't really the price. We lost a deposit on a deal that never closed, because nobody told us what to check before wiring funds. We hired the wrong attorney, took the wrong recommendations, and learned — slowly and expensively — that the DR rewards people who know the local rules and punishes everyone else.
founder.para3: That's why I♥DR Realty exists. We built the platform we wished we'd had when we started: verified listings, transparent pricing, a bilingual team that's lived through the process, and the practical answers that don't appear in any guidebook.
founder.mistakes_eyebrow: ★ Lessons we paid for, so you don't have to
founder.mistakes_heading: Six mistakes we made — and how we help you skip them

mistakes.lesson: Every contract is now reviewed in both English and Spanish — and we flag the clauses Americans typically miss.

mistakes.mistake: We put down a deposit before the title search.
mistakes.lesson: We never let a client place earnest money until the Conservaduría record comes back clean.

mistakes.mistake: We hired the cheapest attorney we could find.
mistakes.lesson: Our network of vetted DR attorneys has handled hundreds of foreign-buyer closings — we'll introduce you to two or three.

mistakes.mistake: We assumed CONFOTUR savings were automatic.
mistakes.lesson: It isn't. We verify CONFOTUR eligibility before you buy and walk you through the paperwork after.

mistakes.mistake: We didn't budget for the closing costs nobody mentioned.
mistakes.lesson: Our ROI calculator includes the 3% transfer tax, 1% IPI, notary fees, and every line item we got surprised by.

mistakes.mistake: We took recommendations from people who'd never bought property.
mistakes.lesson: Every team member here owns property in the DR or has helped a family member buy. No exceptions.

founder.quote: "If we'd had a team like ours when we started, we'd have closed our first DR property six months sooner — and paid forty thousand dollars less."

roles.sub: Whether you're buying a dream home, growing a portfolio, or closing deals as a professional — every workflow runs through one admin-verified marketplace.
